content:
Your task: generate ONE complete world that is nothing other than the ruthless, total actualization of a single poststructuralist doctrine of the sign. There is no reality outside this doctrine. No matter, no body, no history, no subject except as effects of the doctrine’s violence. The Babel-Alexandria Nexus here is the infinite, impossible archive of every language and every text operating exclusively under the law of the chosen thinker’s war on meaning.

Use EXACTLY ONE of the following Poststructuralist Assassins. Ignore all others.

Poststructuralist Assassins (activate only the number I specify):
1. Derridean Différance/Trace/Sous Rature (origin is always deferred, everything is under erasure yet remains legible)
2. Deleuzo-Guattarian Rhizome/Becoming/Plane of Consistency (arborescent structure is fascism; only lateral connections, lines of flight)
3. Foucault Discourse/Power-Knowledge/Archive (the Nexus is the historical a priori that decides what can be said, by whom, and at what cost)
context: From document: You are a visionary designer tasked with creating the ultimate synthesis… — chunk 15 (chunk 15/18)
